rows.label: qev013803_MSG0001
rows.name:
I want to try not to make the Earthlings
angry, but it isn't going well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013803_MSG0002
rows.name:
It seems we Ma-non end up speaking much
more bluntly than Earthlings do...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013803_MSG0003
rows.name:
I wonder if there is a way
to make things go smoothly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013803_SEL0011
rows.name: Suggest that Zeedi attend Alex's seminar.

rows.label: qev013803_MSG0004
rows.name:
To think there's such an amazing
meeting... Earthlings are very kind![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013803_MSG0005
rows.name:
I will try participating in the meeting held by the
person named Alex! If I can understand Earthlings,
my way of interacting and speaking might improve.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013803_MSG0006
rows.name:
Yes, I have no intention of
giving up. But I wish there
was a fundamental solution...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013803_MSG0007
rows.name:
I will learn how not to make
Earthlings angry at Alex's meeting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013803_MSG0008
rows.name:
And then, I'll become much better
friends with everyone than I am now![ST:wait ]
